data.content: Planning complete for knots-5464. Code inspection confirmed the data model (ActionOutputDef, StepMetadata.output, ProfileDefinition.outputs) already supports per-action outputs, but the built-in profiles flatten through legacy_outputs() which applies a single artifact_type to all states, and prompt rendering is pre-baked at profile load time rather than consuming resolved per-step metadata. Three children are scoped: c8f4 defines canonical output-target vocabulary (branch, pull_request, merged_main_commit, live_deployment, note, approval) and updates legacy_outputs() to produce per-action targets; 0d93 updates prompt templates and rendering to use canonical vocabulary from resolved step metadata; 9727 adds regression tests covering vocabulary validation, per-action resolution, prompt rendering, and backward compatibility. Execution order: c8f4 → 0d93 → 9727.
